name: DBCluster
description: Contains the details of an Amazon Neptune DB cluster.

DBClusterArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the DB cluster.

EngineVersion.description: The version of the database engine.

Endpoint.description: The connection endpoint for the primary instance.

ReaderEndpoint.description: The reader endpoint for read replicas.

Port.description: The port that the DB cluster listens on.

MasterUsername.description: The master username for the cluster.

DBClusterParameterGroup.description: The name of the DB cluster parameter group.

DBSubnetGroup.description: The DB subnet group associated with the cluster.

AllocatedStorage.description: The allocated storage size in gigabytes.

ClusterCreateTime.description: The time when the DB cluster was created.

PreferredBackupWindow.description: The daily time range for automated backups.

PreferredMaintenanceWindow.description: The weekly time range for system maintenance.

MultiAZ.description: Whether the cluster is Multi-AZ enabled.

StorageEncrypted.description: Whether the cluster storage is encrypted.

KmsKeyId.description: The KMS key identifier for encrypted clusters.

IAMDatabaseAuthenticationEnabled.description: Whether IAM database authentication is enabled.

DBClusterMembers.description: The list of instances in the cluster.

AssociatedRoles.description: IAM roles associated with the cluster.
